title: Activist Leader / Steward | Logos
description: Start or steward a Circle in your area and build durable local community with structure and impact.

sections.heading: Activist Leader / Steward
sections.intro:
If you care about building stronger local communities, bringing people together, and turning ideas into action, you might be steward material. We're looking for people who want to build something durable in their area - not just host occasional meetups, but create a real local community with structure, continuity, and impact.

Let us know how we can reach you, tell us a bit more about yourself, and share why you'd like to start a Circle in your area. Not every field is required, but more context helps us understand the fit and how we can best support you. We'll review your submission and be in touch.

If you want to learn more about Circles first, please check out our [Circle Guide](http://circles.logos.co)
sections.privacy: We respect your privacy. By clicking 'Submit', you consent to our processing of your personal data as described above and in our Privacy Policy .
